name: Spacenet Enterprises India Limited
summary: Spacenet Enterprises India Limited primarily engages in the trading of commodities in India. It offers Tradetech, a commodity trade platform; Fantasytech; Edutech, a technology enabled education platform; AI block chain tech platform for tracking real time supply chain management; and Foodtech, a technology enabled delivery platforms for quick service restaurant. The company was formerly known as Northgate Com Tech Limited and changed its name to Spacenet Enterprises India Limited in November 2015. Spacenet Enterprises India Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
